description.ko: 가는 성운의 섬모와 짙은 라벤더 별먼지가 무한한 공허 속에서 휘어지며, 보이지 않는 심연의 존재를 드러낸다.
description.en: Hair-thin nebula tendrils and dense lavender star dust bend through the infinite void, revealing a silent abyssal presence beyond sight.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep: a vast abyssal nebula seen as a silent field of cosmic cilia, millions of hair-thin dust tendrils suspended in open space and bending toward an unseen depth without forming a vortex, ring, gate, vessel, planet, or black hole. The background is a seamless expanse of #0D0221 infinite void, almost lightless, while distant banks of #3D1A78 ultraviolet vapor appear as low, transparent auroras stretched across impossible depth. Dense #E6E6FA star dust clings to the tendril tips like frozen luminous pollen, creating high-particle parallax from foreground to far distance; occasional #7B68EE lavender ion beads glow along the strands as if space itself is feeling a slow gravitational breath. The motion is extremely slow and tidal, mysterious and solemn, with restrained lavender luminance, cold volumetric haze, ultra-detailed astrophotographic texture, deep space nebula atmosphere, stars dust everywhere, and cosmic horror majesty in the silent infinite void.
